allow: PowerShell($ts = \(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1\); $errors = \($ts | Out-String\) -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_ -match "error TS" }; "TS errors: $\($errors.Count\)"; $errors | Select-Object -First 10)

Bash(node -e "const p=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0\)\); console.log\('version:', p.version\); console.log\('main:', p.main, '| module:', p.module\); console.log\('exports:', JSON.stringify\(p.exports, null, 2\).slice\(0, 300\)\)")
